close_reason: Duplicate of y7er.15 (new() doc omits errors)
description: The doc comment on Ed25519Signer::new() (and the two analogous methods) says 'Returns InvalidUri if the backend's algorithm is not Ed25519.' In reality the first call is backend.algorithm()? which propagates any SecretError variant — NotFound, Unavailable, Backend, etc. — not just InvalidUri. Callers who read the doc and only handle InvalidUri will miss legitimate backend failures at construction time.
title: new() doc claims only InvalidUri but algorithm() can return any SecretError
